user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable notifying the project admin when a project is closed and set how many days before closure to notify, so that admins are alerted in time
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Resource Management Settings screen; When I enable project-closure notification and enter the days-before value; Then the setting is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable notifying the reporting manager when a resource assignment ends and set the lead time, so that managers can plan reassignments
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Resource Management Settings screen; When I enable the assignment-end notification and set the days before the end date; Then the setting is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure a default bench manager, default assignment duration and default allocated hours, so that unspecified assignments use sensible defaults
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Resource Management Settings screen; When I set the default bench manager, default assignment days and default allocated hours; Then the defaults are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable notifications for project assignments and notify employees on a recurring weekly schedule, so that employees stay informed of their assignments
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Resource Management Settings screen; When I enable project-assignment notifications and set the recurring weekly days; Then the notification schedule is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save my settings or save and proceed to the next screen, so that I can persist configuration without losing progress
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured the Resource Management Settings; When I click Save or Save & Next; Then the settings persist and I remain or advance accordingly
